title: Top 10 Most Shocking Anime Moments Ever
hook: These anime moments broke the internet.
angle: Ranked by cultural impact and shock value

title: Marvel Paid DC $1 to Use a Character
hook: DC actually OWNS a character that Marvel made famous, and they only charge one dollar a year to use him.
angle: The bizarre legal history of Captain Marvel/Shazam creates a mind-blowing corporate rivalry twist most fans never knew existed.

title: Top 10 Pokemon Deaths That Traumatized Every Kid
hook: Pokemon literally made an entire generation cry and nobody talks about it.
angle: Combines childhood nostalgia with surprising dark moments most casual fans forgot or never knew existed across games, anime, and manga.

title: This Pokemon Was Erased From Existence By Nintendo
hook: There is a Pokemon so disturbing that Nintendo literally deleted it from history.
angle: Kadabra was banned from the TCG for over 20 years because a real psychic sued Nintendo claiming they stole his identity and powers.
